market.question: Will Bitcoin hit $150k by June 30, 2026?
market.description:
This market will immediately resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1 minute candle for Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) has a final "High" price equal to or greater than the price specified in the title by 11:59PM ET on the date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "High" prices available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT, with the chart settings on "1m" for one-minute candles selected on the top bar.

Please note that the outcome of this market depends solely on the price data from the Binance BTC/USDT trading pair. Prices from other exchanges, different trading pairs, or spot markets will not be considered for the resolution of this market.

reason_code_labels.thin_history: Too few lifetime trades to score
reason_code_labels.no_resolved: No closed positions to score against
reason_code_labels.market_only_history: History is concentrated in this one market
reason_code_labels.whale_uncopyable: Trade sizes too large to mirror at retail
reason_code_labels.directional_one_shot: Single directional thesis, not a diversified track record
reason_code_labels.general_strong_only: General sharpness, but unproven in crypto specifically

rank_keys_explained.crypto_brier_lower: lower mean Brier on resolved crypto markets is better
rank_keys_explained.overall_brier_lower: lower mean Brier overall is better
rank_keys_explained.backtest_90d: higher ROI on a $1-per-position copy strategy in last 90d is better
rank_keys_explained.drift_lower: more negative drift delta means calibration is improving
rank_keys_explained.copy_smaller: smaller median trade USD = more retail-copyable
rank_keys_explained.breadth_higher: more distinct markets traded = more diverse signal
rank_keys_explained.specialty_higher: higher share of resolved trades in crypto = domain specialist
rank_keys_explained.extreme_higher: higher share of trades at extreme prices = high-conviction style
